==Biography==
ChuChuZ started his online gaming career playing Age of Mythology and Dota attending local LAN tournaments. After a while he was introduced by a friend to League of Legends which he believed was significantly more challenging.

On November 2013, he started his professional player career.
In February 2018, he joined ORDER as coach. 

== Trivia ==
* Popularized {{ci|Syndra}} as a competitive pick in the OCE region.
* Reached High-Diamond in Season 3 on 210 ping to the NA Server.
* His name "ChuChuZ" originated from famous steam train in Australia.
* Co-founded Legacy Esports
